summary: ClashSolverExtendSelectedNodeBy100mmCommand — PDF "EXTEND_NODE". Extend one specific connector by 100 mm.
usecase: Prepare a single named end-run to meet the next node.
notfor: Extending every connector at once — use the other Extend* command.
precondition: Active document; element + connector id resolvable; connector is not already connected.
postcondition: Exactly one new Pipe created inside one Transaction.
logictree:
1) Resolver_ElementUniqueId + Resolver_ConnectorId required.
2) Resolve element + ConnectorManager; fetch the connector by Id; WireError if any missing.
3) If connector.IsConnected → WireRecoverable + no-op + tracker output says already_connected.
4) length_mm = Resolver_LengthMm ?? 100; direction = connector.CoordinateSystem.BasisZ.
5) Resolve PipeTypeId + SystemTypeId + LevelId from the source element / connector.
6) Open Transaction "ClashSolver::ExtendNode"; Pipe.Create(doc, systemTypeId, pipeTypeId, levelId, origin, origin + dir*length); set diameter from connector; commit.
7) Emit created_pipe_id, length_mm, origin_ft, direction.

preprompts: Extending one named connector by 100 mm…
thinkingsteps: Creating a single Pipe along the connector axis…
